entries.reason: Rollout occurs through the existing post-merge release documentation workflow with no manual operator step. CI docs:build and the generated release pages are the observability surface; rollback is one commit followed by regeneration.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: The review surface is one pure normalization boundary plus its projections and tests. A single gate reviewer owns implementation, generated-output, traceability, and rollback assessment; independent AC and judgment adjudicators remain separate.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: This change adds no schema, persisted state, protocol, or feature gate. Reverting the implementation commit restores the previous projector; rerunning the release projection regenerates prior-form output. Unit and docs-build artifacts cover upgrade behavior.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
